title: Spooky Scary Creatures
description: [OPTIFINE] Adds horror-themed mobs into your game, like the famous Slenderman.
body:
This pack adds both hostile and passive mobs into the game, including mythical mobs like a golden bunny or a goblin.

Golden Bunny

The Golden Bunny is a rare creature that holds valuable treasure...
It has a 20% chance to spawn and you can find them in the same biomes as normal rabbits.

Slenderman

This entity has a 10% to be seen roaming forests...
If you were to suddenly look it in the eyes,a TV cut-off signal will cover your screen, blocking your vision and he will not stop chasing you until you are dead.

Goblin

Goblins are commonly found in the day usually around open areas.
They will attack you on sight,looking to steal your belongings...

Medusa

Medusa is a powerful mob that is found in the swamps during midnight.
Do not look at her for she will stone you! She will attempt to summon snakes to chase after you if you decide to flee...
Killing her will grant you with treasure...

Snake

These annoying little things spawn commonly in swamps and at daytime,
Dont get too close as they will inflict a dangerous poison when they bite!

Villager Spirit

Villager Spirits can be found in the nether amongst the Piglins.
They are trapped villager souls,perhaps you can cure them?
